---
title: ""
toc: false
editor: source
freeze: false
---

```{r load_packages, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, include=FALSE}
library(gsheet)
library(tidyverse)

SHEET_URL <- "https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1id1P5ke9ZJckr_6ePP84FOLeQPoHb57eitX7yaZ_l8A/edit#gid=1834640090"

profile <- Sys.getenv("QUARTO_PROFILE", unset = "en")

rol_translations <- c(
  "director"    = "supervisor",
  "co-director" = "co-supervisor"
)

render_rol <- function(rol) {
  if (is.na(rol) || trimws(rol) == "") return("")
  label <- if (profile == "en") {
    key <- str_to_lower(trimws(rol))
    ifelse(key %in% names(rol_translations), rol_translations[[key]], rol)
  } else {
    rol
  }
  paste0('<div><span class="member-rol">', label, '</span></div>\n')
}
```

::: {.content-visible when-profile="en"}
### Current
:::
::: {.content-visible when-profile="es"}
### Actuales
:::

```{r current-students, results='asis'}
#| echo: false

members <- gsheet2tbl(SHEET_URL)
current <- members %>% filter(fecha == "actual", is.na(mostrar) | mostrar == TRUE)

cat('<div class="members-grid">\n')
for (i in seq_len(nrow(current))) {
  m <- current[i, ]
  proyecto_html <- if (!is.na(m$proyecto) && m$proyecto != "")
    paste0('<div class="member-project">', m$proyecto, '</div>\n') else ""
  cat(paste0(
    '<div class="member-card">\n',
    '<div class="member-name">', m$nombre, '</div>\n',
    proyecto_html,
    '<div class="member-carrera">', m$carrera, '</div>\n',
    render_rol(m$rol),
    '</div>\n'
  ))
}
cat('</div>\n\n')
```

::: {.content-visible when-profile="en"}
### Past
:::
::: {.content-visible when-profile="es"}
### Anteriores
:::

```{r past-students, results='asis'}
#| echo: false

past <- members %>% filter(fecha == "pasado", is.na(mostrar) | mostrar == TRUE)

cat('<div class="members-grid">\n')
for (i in seq_len(nrow(past))) {
  m <- past[i, ]
  proyecto_html <- if (!is.na(m$proyecto) && m$proyecto != "")
    paste0('<div class="member-project">', m$proyecto, '</div>\n') else ""
  cat(paste0(
    '<div class="member-card">\n',
    '<div class="member-name">', m$nombre, '</div>\n',
    proyecto_html,
    '<div class="member-carrera">', m$carrera, '</div>\n',
    render_rol(m$rol),
    '</div>\n'
  ))
}
cat('</div>\n\n')
```
